generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for 3D environment mapping and object detection in the physical twin entity."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted, ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera for visual perception and object tracking in the physical twin entity."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraDepthDataTransmitted, ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensors measuring speed, steering angle, and other ego-vehicle metrics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point clouds transmitted via ROS2 network to Data Collection FE in Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraDepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Camera depth data transmitted via ROS2 network to Data Pre-Processing FE in Physical Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance ObjectTrackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks (via DBSCAN and Kalman filter) transmitted as structured timeseries data to Data Collecting FE and Presentation FE."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time ego-vehicle state data (speed, steering angle) transmitted via ROS2 network to Data Collection FE in Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Uses DBSCAN for clustering and Kalman filter for tracking object states (position, velocity) from LiDAR and camera data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler, MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AdaptiveCruiseControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements performance class I ACC (ISO 15622) with lead vehicle detection and speed adjustment strategies."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler, NVIDIAJetpackEnabler
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Renders ego-vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path in real-time for visualization purposes."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2VisualizationEnabler, OpenGLEngineEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured timeseries data containing speed, steering angle, and sensor fusion outputs from the physical twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler, ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "ID-assigned object tracks with state estimates (position, velocity) for ACC decision-making."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler, ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance RawSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Pre-processed raw sensor data including LiDAR point clouds and camera depth data before use in tracking models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted, CameraDepthDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingModel
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for intra-entity communication and node lifecycle management across all entities."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationService, DataCollectionService, ActuationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for Jetson Orin Nano programming and hardware acceleration."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService, DataPreProcessingService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems like point cloud processing and algorithm development."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingModel
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for structured storage of timeseries data and reporting."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService, DataStorageService
]

instance ROS2VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 visualization tools for real-time 3D rendering of vehicle state and object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance OpenGLEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OpenGL-based rendering engine for 3D visualization of the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationModel
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation FE for serialization, unit conversion, and ROS2 message type alignment."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataTranslationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Serializes and translates data between physical and virtual worlds using ROS2 message types and unit conversions."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTranslationInsight
]

instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Collects real-time data from physical twin (ego-vehicle state, object tracks) for digital twin processing."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataCollectionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of ego-vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes ACC logic (lead vehicle detection, speed computation) in Digital Twin Entity to reduce vehicle load."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionMakingInsight, RemoteManagementAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable timeseries reports of object tracks and vehicle state for analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportingInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Stores ego-vehicle state and object tracks in external SQL database to mitigate vehicle storage limitations."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataPersistenceInsight
]

instance ActuationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Relays actuation commands from Digital Twin Entity to Physical Twin Entity for motor and steering control."
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakingAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction
]

instance DataPreProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Processes raw sensor data (DBSCAN clustering, Kalman filtering) before transmission to Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackData
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance DataTranslationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data is properly serialized and translated between physical and virtual worlds with consistent units and message formats."
]

instance RealTimeDataCollectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time transmission of ego-vehicle state and object tracks from physical to virtual world via ROS2 network."
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operators gain real-time insights into ego-vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path through 3D visualization."
]

instance ACCDecisionMakingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC system makes real-time decisions based on processed object tracks and ego-vehicle state."
]

instance ReportingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated reports provide timeseries analysis of vehicle state and object tracks for post-hoc analysis."
]

instance DataPersistenceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "All critical data is stored externally in SQL database for long-term analysis and compliance."
]

instance RemoteManagementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operators can enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and trigger emergency braking via control panel."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote emergency braking command transmitted from Digital Twin System User Interface to Physical Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic speed adjustment based on ACC logic and lead vehicle detection."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of ACC parameters (e.g., following distance) via control panel."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for vehicle actuation."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls vehicle steering based on commands from Digital Twin Entity."
]

// C1: Physical Twin Entity Components
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosts sensor/actuator interfaces and pre-processing for the 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle."
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera, VehicleStateSensor,
                 VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServoActuator,
                 DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Processes raw sensor data (DBSCAN clustering, Kalman filtering) before transmission to Digital Twin Entity."
    base:contains PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingModel
]

// C1: Digital Twin Entity Components
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosts ACC logic, data collection, storage, and visualization components."
    base:contains DataCollectionFE, DataTranslationFE, ACCControlFE, ThreeDVisualizationFE,
                 SQLDatabaseStorage
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Collects and processes real-time data from physical twin for digital twin processing."
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles data serialization, unit conversion, and ROS2 message type alignment."
]

instance ACCControlFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Implements ACC logic (lead vehicle detection, speed computation) for autonomous driving."
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Renders real-time 3D visualization of ego-vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path."
]

instance SQLDatabaseStorage : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "External SQL database for structured storage of timeseries data and reporting."
]

// C1: User Entity Components
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosts visualization and control interfaces for operator interaction."
    base:contains ControlPanelUI, ThreeDVisualizationUI
]

instance ControlPanelUI : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Provides remote management capabilities (enable/disable ACC, set speed, trigger emergency braking)."
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationUI : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization interface showing ego-vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path in real-time."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual to the physical world include:
  - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the **Digital Twin Entity** and sent back to the **Actuation FE** in the **Physical Twin Entity**.
  - **Remote management commands** (enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed, emergency braking) transmitted via the **User Entity** (Control Panel) to the **Actuation FE**.
  - **Actuation commands** (motor voltage and steering adjustments) executed on the **lower-level chassis** via the **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller** and **steering servo**.
  Communication between entities uses **Wi-Fi** (for inter-entity) and **ROS2** (for intra-entity) with a **maximum end-to-end latency of 100 ms** (per **3GPP TS 22.185**)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time-scale is **real-time** with the following constraints:
  - **End-to-end latency** between vehicle and Digital Twin Entity must not exceed **100 ms** (per **3GPP TS 22.185** for V2V communication).
  - **Clock synchronization** across components must be accurate to **±100 ms** (due to hardware limitations; stricter synchronization is mandated in safety-critical applications but not implemented here).
  - **Perception cycle**: Object tracks and vehicle state are updated **continuously** (no explicit frequency specified, but assumed to align with sensor refresh rates, e.g., LiDAR/camera frame rates)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation is orchestrated as follows:
  - **Architecture**: Based on **ISO 23247 Reference Architecture (RA)** with adaptations:
    - **Physical Twin Entity** (custom addition; encapsulates vehicle-specific resources).
    - **Digital Twin Entity** (hosts ACC logic, data collection, and storage).
    - **User Entity** (split into **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** sub-FEs).
  - **Deployment**:
    - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the vehicle’s **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (handles sensor data pre-processing and actuation).
    - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on **external hardware** (cloud/edge) for computation offloading.
    - **User Entity**: Deployed on a **separate UI system** (e.g., laptop/desktop) for operator interaction.
  - **Data Flow**:
    - Sensor data → **Physical Twin Entity** → **Data Translation FE** → **Digital Twin Entity** → **User Entity**.
    - Commands → **User Entity** → **Digital Twin Entity** → **Physical Twin Entity** → **Actuators**.
  - **Synchronization**: Achieved via **ROS2 topics** (intra-entity) and **Wi-Fi** (inter-entity) with **100 ms latency** and **100 ms clock accuracy** constraints."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is primarily used during the **operation phase** of the vehicle lifecycle, supporting **real-time monitoring, remote management, and computation offloading** for the ACC system. During the **design phase**, the DT could theoretically serve as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** (as referenced in the literature), but this is not explicitly implemented in the case study. The DT covers the **as-operated** representation of the PT, focusing on real-time synchronization with the physical system rather than ideal or manufactured states. The system adheres to **ISO 15622** for ACC functionality, ensuring compliance with operational requirements."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity considerations include:
  - **Real-Time Fidelity**: Achieved via **low-latency communication (≤100 ms)** and **sensor fusion** (LiDAR + camera) for accurate object tracking.
  - **Model Validity**:
    - **Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking**: Validated via **DBSCAN** (for clustering) and **Kalman filter** (for tracking), ensuring accurate state estimates.
    - **ACC Control**: Implements **ISO 15622 performance class I** standards for basic control strategies.
  - **Verification and Validation**:
    - **Latency Testing**: Ensures end-to-end communication meets **3GPP TS 22.185** requirements.
    - **Clock Synchronization**: Validated to **±100 ms** accuracy (hardware-limited).
    - **Data Integrity**: Achieved via **ROS2 message serialization** and **Data Translation FE** for unit conversions.
  - **Uncertainty**: Addressed via **sensor fusion** and **Kalman filtering**, though no explicit uncertainty quantification is detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection details are:
  - **Network Protocols**:
    - **ROS2** for intra-entity communication (e.g., between **Data Pre-Processing FE** and **Data Collecting FE**).
    - **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication (e.g., **Digital Twin Entity ↔ Physical Twin Entity**).
  - **Architecture**:
    - **ROS2 Network**: Used for local (vehicle) communication between nodes.
    - **Wi-Fi Network**: Used for remote (cloud/edge) communication between entities.
  - **Latency Requirements**:
    - **Maximum end-to-end latency**: **100 ms** (per **3GPP TS 22.185** for V2V communication).
    - **Clock Synchronization**: **±100 ms** accuracy across components.
  - **Data Translation**: Handled by the **Data Translation FE**, which serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions (e.g., converting motor voltage commands to ROS2 message formats)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **Physical Twin Entity** is deployed on the PT’s **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano**, hosting sensor data processing (e.g., point cloud tracking) and actuation commands. The **Digital Twin Entity** and **User Entity** are hosted on **external hardware** (not specified in the document), enabling computation offloading and remote management. The **Digital Twin Entity** does not use a split architecture (real-time/offline components) as seen in other adaptations of ISO 23247 (e.g., battery systems). Instead, it focuses on **modular ROS2 packages** for scalability."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is implied but not explicitly detailed in the document. Potential integration points include **Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication** (e.g., sharing object tracks with other vehicles), **cloud-based fleet coordination** (as mentioned in the abstract), and **digital threads** for end-to-end vehicle lifecycle management. The DT could theoretically interface with **third-party APIs** (e.g., mapping services, traffic data) or **manufacturing systems** (if extended beyond ACC). However, no specific integration mechanisms are described."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin follows the following standards:
  - **Architectural Standard**: **ISO 23247 Part 2 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework – Reference Architecture)** as the primary reference, with adaptations for automotive use.
  - **ACC Standard**: **ISO 15622** for performance class I ACC implementation (basic control strategies).
  - **Communication Standard**: **3GPP TS 22.185** for **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) latency requirements** (≤100 ms).
  - **Middleware Standard**: **ROS2** for intra-entity communication and node lifecycle management.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: While no specific standard is cited, the **±100 ms accuracy** aligns with general distributed system requirements (though stricter standards like **IEEE 1588** are implied for safety-critical applications)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The DT incorporates the following **safety considerations**: **(1) Real-time Constraints**: **100 ms latency** and **clock synchronization** to **100 ms accuracy** ensure timely and coordinated operation, **(2) Human-in-the-Loop**: The system is classified as a **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop** (per David and Bork’s taxonomy), **(3) ACC Compliance**: Implementation of **ISO 15622** for **Performance Class I ACC**, **(4) Safety-Critical Design**: The system respects the **safety-critical nature** of automotive applications by offloading computation to reduce on-board ECU burden. **Security considerations** are not explicitly detailed in the document, though the use of **ROS2** and **Wi-Fi** suggests potential vulnerabilities (e.g., unauthorized access, data tampering) are not addressed. The system does not describe **remote operation safeguards** (e.g., fail-safes for emergency braking) beyond the **100 ms latency** constraint."
]
